hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); HOOK_ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('stop_hook_active','false'))"); if [ "$HOOK_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -re '.transcript_path // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('transcript_path',''))"); LINES=$(git diff HEAD --numstat 2>/dev/null | awk '{add+=$1; del+=$2} END {print add+del+0}'); if [ "$LINES" -ge 10 ] && [ -n "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && ! grep -q '/simplify' "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"/simplify を実行してからコードレビューを完了してください（10行以上の変更があります）"}'; fi
